case_title: JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC VS. DOMINICK ZABALA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 100049735) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100049735) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 1788.60A (TRANSACTION ID # 100049735) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ZABALA, DOMINICK AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-10-2018

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100035304), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC SERVED JUN-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZABALA, DOMINICK AN INDIVIDUAL

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $276.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100049735) AS TO DEFENDANT ZABALA, DOMINICK AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST AND ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100049735) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC
DECLARATION RE ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (TRANSACTION ID # 100049735) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZABALA, DOMINICK AN INDIVIDUAL $2,594.43 PRINCIPAL, $276.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,870.43, SEE SCANNED DOC
